Book Inspection

What We Look For

Every dot is a checkpoint. Hover to see what Southern Nevada Health District inspectors evaluate.

Refrigeration Temperatures

All refrigeration units must maintain 41°F or below. SNHD inspectors probe internal temps — not just the dial reading.

Bottle Labeling & Original Containers

All spirits must be in their original labeled containers. Refilling brand-name bottles with cheaper product is a critical violation.

Food Contact Surface Sanitation

Bar tops and prep surfaces must be cleaned and sanitized every 4 hours minimum. Sanitizer concentration is tested on-site.

Ice Handling & Contamination

Ice is considered a food. Scoops must be stored handle-up, never submerged. No direct hand contact with ice is permitted.

Handwashing Station Compliance

Dedicated handwash sinks must be accessible, stocked with soap and paper towels, and used ONLY for handwashing — not dumping drinks or rinsing tools.

Glassware Storage & Air Drying

Glasses must be inverted or stored to prevent contamination. Towel-drying glassware is a violation — air drying only.

Floor, Drain & Pest Evidence

Inspectors check for standing water, grease buildup, drain covers, and any evidence of pest activity under and behind the bar.

Employee Health & Food Handler Cards

All food handlers must have valid Southern Nevada Health District food handler cards on-site and available for review.

Just the Beginning

These are just a few of the major checkpoints we evaluate. A real Southern Nevada Health District inspection covers dozens of additional criteria — many of which bar owners don't know exist until it's too late.

Reach out to get the full picture. We'll walk you through our complete checklist and show you exactly what your bar could be flagged for.

Get the Full Checklist →

Based on Southern Nevada Health District inspection criteria.

Your Journey with Bar Ready LV

1

Discovery

Client finds Bar Ready LV via Google Ads, Facebook Ads, or Instagram Ads. Our reach ensures you can find us exactly when you need us most.

2

Booking

Client books an appointment through our booking process. We make scheduling simple and stress-free so you can get started right away.

3

Pre-Inspection Outreach

We send a welcome email introducing Bar Ready LV and a detailed list of what the Mock Health and Safety Inspection covers — so you know exactly what to expect.

4

Day-Of Confirmation

We email and text you to confirm the appointment on the day of the inspection. No surprises, no confusion — just clear communication from our team.

5

On-Site Inspection

We meet you at your bar, walk through all services, and perform the full Mock Health and Safety Inspection. Thorough, professional, and minimally disruptive to your operations.

6

Results Delivery

We thank you and deliver detailed inspection results via email within 1–2 business days. Every finding is prioritized by urgency so you know what to address first.

7

Retention

We confirm the next month's appointment and send a final thank-you message to close the loop. Ongoing compliance, month after month.

Take It Further

For bars that want the real test.

Advanced Option

Unannounced Mock Inspection

SNHD inspectors don't call ahead — and neither will we. Schedule an unannounced Mock Health and Safety Inspection where we arrive at a random time, catching your staff exactly as a real inspector would find them. No preparation. No variables. Just the real picture of your bar's compliance at any given moment.

Bars that pass an unannounced mock inspection know they're truly protected — not just on their best day.

Inquire About Unannounced Inspections →

Catch compliance gaps before they cost you closures and fines

Real Staff Accountability

See exactly how your team performs without advance notice or preparation

Scale With Confidence

Prove compliance standards hold across locations and at any hour

Key Deliverables

Every Mock Health and Safety Inspection comes with clear, professional documentation.

📄

Invoice

Provided per service. Clear, itemized, and delivered promptly so your records stay clean.

📋

Inspection Results Report

Delivered by email within 1–2 business days following your Mock Health and Safety Inspection. Detailed, actionable, and easy to understand.

Results Walkthrough Call

After your report is delivered, we schedule a dedicated call to walk through every finding together — what needs immediate attention, what you're already doing right, and exactly what to fix before a real inspector shows up.

Frequently Asked Questions

Most Mock Health and Safety Inspections take 1–2 hours depending on the size and layout of your venue. We work efficiently and thoroughly to minimize disruption to your operations.

We conduct a comprehensive review covering food handling and storage, sanitation, equipment maintenance, staff hygiene, temperature logs, and more — mirroring the standards used by actual health inspectors.

Not at all. Our Mock Health and Safety Inspections are designed to work around your schedule and operations. Many clients prefer to schedule during slower hours.

You'll receive a detailed Inspection Results Report within 1–2 business days outlining every finding, prioritized by urgency, so you know exactly what to address first.

Yes — our Monthly Plan at $350/month keeps your bar consistently inspection-ready. We also offer an Annual Plan at $3,900 for maximum peace of mind and savings.
